calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Order Confriming Trust And Interested Persons' Ownership In Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Allen & Jillian Jones for (Petitioner) David Morgenstein.

Ms. Jones reported that when the 2013 deed was created Ms. Morgenstein was sick/dying, that the accountant said that the property was in the percentages listed, that the deed was meant to clarify the percentages and that the tax returns were filed based on the percentages. Mr. Allen stated that he prepared the 2013 deed, at the time was not aware of the 2002 deed and that the title on the deed was incorrect. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust and interested Persons Ownership in Real Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Yeung. (Not Reported)
